## E2E Coverage

- [ ] Browser/UI E2E covered or skipped with `Reason:` and `Rerun:`
- [ ] API/billing E2E covered or skipped with `Reason:` and `Rerun:`
- [ ] Deploy/ops E2E covered or skipped with `Reason:` and `Rerun:`

## Documentation

- [ ] README/runbooks/templates updated for changed behavior
- [ ] Feature `handoff.md` includes `How To Use And Test`
- [ ] User-facing final test instructions are ready

## Verification

- [ ] `bash ops/dev-gate.sh docs/ai-dev/<YYYY-MM-DD-topic>`
- [ ] Live E2E or production-gate commands run when required
- [ ] Skipped checks include concrete reason and rerun command
